extensions.description: Beta: agent-powered desktop view for managed servers. Streams live Windows/Linux screenshots when available, with a synthetic desktop fallback for headless hosts.
extensions.author: Juan Denis

extensions.description: Provision new servers from connected cloud providers, as the Cloud Servers tab in the Servers group.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Cloudflare zone operations on top of your existing Cloudflare DNS connection, covering zone settings, cache purge, WAF, Workers, Tunnels, and R2/KV/D1 storage. DNS records and the connection itself stay in the core Domains surface; this adds the per-zone control panel reached from a Cloudflare-managed domain.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: CrowdSec security engine integration. Surface active decisions and alerts, ban/unban IPs, and manage allowlists straight from the panel. Read/write via cscli on the host; shows install guidance when CrowdSec is absent (never auto-installs).
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Host authoritative DNS on this box with PowerDNS (SQLite backend) in a managed Docker container, covering zones, records, DNSSEC, and delegation checks from the panel. Authoritative only (no recursion); complements provider integrations like Cloudflare, never replaces them. Built for homelab and air-gapped setups.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Full mail-server stack with Postfix/Dovecot, domains, mailboxes, aliases, DKIM/SPF/DMARC, SpamAssassin filtering, and Roundcube webmail. Most panels never run a mail server, so it ships as an opt-in extension.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: FTP server management (vsftpd/proftpd) with install, users, config and logs, as a tab in the Files group.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Self-hosted Git server (Gitea) exposed through the ServerKit extension system.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Live NVIDIA GPU metrics covering utilization, memory, temperature, power and fan, for servers with a GPU.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Self-hosted mail server powered by Stalwart in a managed Docker container, providing domains, mailboxes, forwarders, and autoresponders, with automatic DKIM/SPF/DMARC/MX record deployment, a deliverability preflight (PTR, port-25 egress, RBL) that gates outbound sending, brute-force jails, and maildir backups. Most panels never run a mail server, so it ships as an opt-in extension.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: WireGuard remote-access tunnels between paired agents to expose NAT'd home services through an edge server. Fleet-wide view as a tab in the Servers group; per-server management stays on the server detail page.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Public status pages backed by uptime monitors, with the management UI as a tab in the Observability group. The public /status/<slug> page itself stays core.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: The full WordPress suite, covering site provisioning, plugin library, environments/pipelines, updates, security hardening, vulnerability scanning, analytics and reports. Ships bundled and installed by default (a flagship), and can be uninstalled to slim the core.
extensions.author: ServerKit

extensions.description: Visual automation builder. Chain deploy, build, and notification steps into pipelines on a drag-and-drop canvas.
extensions.author: ServerKit
